data_description.url: Base URL of your Gatus instance (e.g. https://status.example.com)
data_description.api_key: Leave blank if Gatus has no authentication configured
data_description.prefix: Prefix for entity object IDs (default: gatus_)

user.description: Connect to your Gatus monitoring instance

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the Gatus instance. Check the URL and try again.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Check your API key.

abort.already_configured: A Gatus instance at this URL is already configured.
